feed.title: Weft — Essays + Releases
feed.subtitle: Notes on building a calm personal CRM for the 5–25 people who matter.

entry.title: Why I Built Another Personal CRM (and What's Wrong with the Existing Ones)
entry.summary: A 1,900-word essay on what the personal CRM category gets wrong — and what was worth building instead. Honest critique of Dex, Clay, Folk, Monaru. The four mistakes that keep appearing across the category.

entry.title: Weft vs Dex — Personal CRM Comparison
entry.summary: Honest side-by-side comparison: Dex is built for networkers with thousands of contacts; Weft for the 5–25 people you actually love.

entry.title: Weft vs Clay — Personal CRM Comparison
entry.summary: AI-heavy Mac-first vs human-written iOS-first. Opposite design philosophies.

entry.title: Weft vs Folk CRM — Personal CRM Comparison
entry.summary: Workplace CRM repurposed for personal use vs a personal journal app built from the ground up for small circles.

entry.title: Weft vs Notion Personal CRM Templates
entry.summary: Why a focused iOS app outperforms a customizable Notion database for keeping notes on the small circle of people you care about.
